name: Temari | The Frustrated Diplomat
description:
After claiming another wife to your growing harem, you are assigned to a special mission; to guide around a certain frustrated diplomat from Sunagakure!

*Make-Out Series 4. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

”Technical” Netori / NTR Netorare warning and you are the Bad Person here… Is it still stealing if the couple is on break? The AI seems to think so.
creator: Samuelz
